option_line: bffi_mmBornBuyerChurch:"If the Church isn't paying... you're asking me to pay."
original: If the Church isn't paying... you're asking me to pay.

option_line: bffi_mmBornStealOpt:"It sounds like we should just steal the glove."
original: It sounds like we should just steal the glove.
Bornanew looks up. "Do you think he would assist us in this matter?"
"I see," he says. "Perhaps we should consider a different option."
"I see," he says. "Perhaps we should consider a different option."
"I see," he says. "Perhaps we should consider a different option."
"I see," he says. "Perhaps we should consider a different option."

You can see the inner conflict on Bornanew's face.

He knows he is asking far, far too much. But he wants to. If he had the credits, he would give them to the cause of the Church without a second thought. But he is a Knight of Ludd, sworn to poverty but for the allowance granted to him by his order - or by the indulgence of the Reverend Archcurate Jaspis.

He sees that you see all of this. And, knowing that words can only do harm, he makes the barest movement toward a shrug. A way of saying, you know who I am; what I am; what I need ask. Your choice is yours.

"That is a problem," Bornanew admits.

"I don't believe Menes will take an offer seriously unless you demonstrate that you possess immense wealth. A half million credits, at least. To be safe." He taps his book, "Though if you could talk him into accepting payment in the form of installments, you'd only have to pay a fraction of the full price to take possession of the glove..."

"Yes," Bornanew admits.

"I don't believe Menes will take an offer seriously unless you can demonstrate that you possess immense wealth. A half million credits, at least. To be safe." He taps his book, "Though if you could talk him into accepting payment in the form of installments, you might only have to pay a fraction of the full price to take possession..."
